name: brainstorming
description: Structured ideation plugin for exploring options, naming, and tradeoffs before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate concrete options with clear tradeoffs
interface.longDescription: Use Brainstorming to explore multiple directions, compare tradeoffs, create names, and turn vague ideas into concrete next steps before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Give me three product directions for this idea.
Help me compare architecture options and tradeoffs.
Generate naming options for this feature.
